entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Holy Priest Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Optionally open with . It's a slow cast but mana-efficient.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Holy Priest Healer in Burning Crusade
Leveling Rotation for Holy Priest Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Cast . This deals higher DPS but costs more mana than Smite. Do not use it if you constantly run out of mana.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Holy Priest Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Cast Shadow Word: Death . Skip if your health is low, or burst damage may occur.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Holy Priest Healer in Burning Crusade
Leveling Rotation for Holy Priest Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: is your only AoE damaging spell, so generally when AoEing, you will cast this repeatedly.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Holy Priest Healer in Burning Crusade
entries.text: If targets are few and are expected to stay alive for at least 15 seconds, you may consider blanketing the pack with .

sections.heading: Leveling Rotation for Holy Priest Healer in Burning Crusade

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Holy Priest Healer in TBC Classic
entries.text: Depending on your mana levels, you can rush another mob or wait for a while. grants mana while casting, but 5 seconds after your last successful cast, the amount regenerated is doubled. Manage this mechanic to squeeze as much mana as needed!

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Holy Priest Healer in TBC Classic
entries.text: You may use the global cooldown downtime of instant spells to strafe away from the mob a little. This delays the mob catching up with you, granting an additional second or two of casting without pushback. Make sure to use strafe movement (running to the sides, which can be keybound in the keybinds menu) and never walk backwards, as it is much slower.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Holy Priest Healer in TBC Classic
entries.text: Spirit is generally considered a useless stat, but this is not the case for Priest. Spirit Tap scales with Spirit and is a major source of regeneration, making the stat definitely worth stacking. This applies to solo gameplay where you can deal killing blows easily, but also dungeons, as it greatly boosts mana regeneration via ,

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Holy Priest Healer in TBC Classic
entries.text: Always keep your buffs up. Even if appears unassuming, it prevents some incoming damage and is not consumed when shielded. can now be accessed by all races, so make sure to make good use of this spell, especially on heavily contested PvP servers.

sections.heading: Leveling Tips for Holy Priest Healer in TBC Classic
